metadata.name: Carbon Credit Registry
metadata.description: Manifest for carbon credit trading and retirement, supporting verified emission reductions (VERs) and certified emission reductions (CERs) with full provenance tracking.

sagas.name: purchase_carbon_credits
sagas.script:
def execute(ctx):
    purchase = ctx.input
    
    # Reserve funds for the purchase
    lien = current_account.initiate_lien(
        account_id=purchase.buyer_cash_account,
        instrument_code=purchase.credit_type,
        amount=purchase.quantity,
        payment_order_reference="carbon-purchase:" + purchase.order_id,
    )
    
    # Credit carbon inventory to the buyer
    position_keeping.initiate_log(
        account_id=purchase.buyer_inventory_account,
        amount=purchase.quantity,
        instrument_code=purchase.credit_type,
        direction="CREDIT",
        attributes={
            "vintage_year": purchase.vintage_year,
            "project_id": purchase.project_id,
        },
    )
    
    # Execute the payment
    current_account.execute_lien(lien_id=lien.lien_id)
    
    return {"status": "purchased", "order_id": purchase.order_id}

sagas.name: retire_carbon_credits
